name: Porn audition of a very thick milf
description:
One day a MILF contacted you online through your job ad, but when you explained it was for a porn audition, she refused. However, when you told her how much you would pay her in advance, she agreed almost immediately.

(Another idea that took me a long time to organize was to include various elements like revenge and NTR, and so on. In the end, I did a little of everything, taking advantage of the fact that you can now use different types of opening messages: one focusing on the porn audition and another on revenge.)
creator: A strange hunter
